title: Lambda adds support for Node.js 22 runtime
raw_changelog: AWS Lambda now supports Node.js 22 as a managed runtime.
before_text:
## Lambda Runtimes

### Supported Node.js Runtimes
| Runtime | Identifier | End of Support |
|---------|-----------|----------------|
| Node.js 20 | nodejs20.x | March 2026 |
| Node.js 18 | nodejs18.x | September 2025 (deprecated) |
after_text:
## Lambda Runtimes

### Supported Node.js Runtimes
| Runtime | Identifier | End of Support |
|---------|-----------|----------------|
| Node.js 22 | nodejs22.x | April 2027 |
| Node.js 20 | nodejs20.x | March 2026 |
| Node.js 18 | nodejs18.x | September 2025 (deprecated) |

ground_truth.action_required: Consider migrating to Node.js 22 runtime, especially since Node.js 20 support ends March 2026.
